creator: ebrandi@fugspbr.org
text:
Hi,

Im sending attached a patch to update Brazilian Portuguese version 
of "Contributing" article, from CVS revison 1.496 (very old) to 
SVN revision r38826.

With this patch pt_BR version of this pt_BR version of article will 
be synced with last en_US version.

Attached compressed file contain 2 patchs:

patch.mailing-lists must be applied to head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/share/sgml/mailing-lists.ent

and

patch.pt_BR.ISO8859-1_contributing must be applied to head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing

Thks

Edson Brandi

Ps: If you have problems to uudecode attached file, you can download 
tgz file from following url:

http://server06.ebrandi.eti.br/articles/update_to_pt_BR_article_contributing.tgz
